query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(750009, 'What are the elements of Old Testament narrative?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only dialogue","Plot, characters, setting, point of view, and dialogue","Only historical facts","Only moral lessons"]', 'Plot, characters, setting, point of view, and dialogue', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(750009, 'What are the three levels of biblical narrative?', 'multiple_choice', '["Past, present, future","Top (God''s plan), middle (Israel''s story), bottom (individual episodes)","Beginning, middle, end","Introduction, body, conclusion"]', 'Top (God''s plan), middle (Israel''s story), bottom (individual episodes)', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(750009, 'What is the theological purpose of Old Testament narratives?', 'multiple_choice', '["Entertainment only","Reveal God''s character and demonstrate His faithfulness","Provide moral examples only","Record history without meaning"]', 'Reveal God''s character and demonstrate His faithfulness', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(750009, 'What is the difference between descriptive and prescriptive in narrative?', 'multiple_choice', '["No difference","Descriptive tells what happened; prescriptive tells what should happen","Both are the same","Neither applies to narrative"]', 'Descriptive tells what happened; prescriptive tells what should happen', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(750009, 'According to Romans 15:4, why was the Old Testament written?', 'multiple_choice', '["For entertainment","For our instruction","To replace the New Testament","To confuse readers"]', 'For our instruction', 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(750009, 'What error involves reducing narratives to mere moral lessons?', 'multiple_choice', '["Allegorizing","Moralizing","Spiritualizing","Literalizing"]', 'Moralizing', 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(750009, 'What should be at the center of narrative interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Human heroes","God","The reader","Cultural context"]', 'God', 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(750009, 'According to Luke 24:27, what did Jesus show in all the Scriptures?', 'multiple_choice', '["Moral lessons","Things concerning Himself","Historical facts only","Future predictions"]', 'Things concerning Himself', 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(750009, 'What is "character-centered reading" and why should it be avoided?', 'multiple_choice', '["Focusing on God","Making humans rather than God the focus","Reading about characters","Analyzing dialogue"]', 'Making humans rather than God the focus', 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(750009, 'How should we apply narratives according to the lesson?', 'multiple_choice', '["Direct imitation of characters","Through their theological principles","Ignore them entirely","Only as entertainment"]', 'Through their theological principles', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(750009, 'Choose an Old Testament narrative and explain how to interpret it while avoiding common errors like moralizing or allegorizing.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Student response required', 11, NOW(), NOW());
